title: eschweilera boltenii
intro: Eschweilera boltenii, also known as Bolten's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lecythidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eschweilera boltenii include reducing inflammation and fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the bark and leaves are prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and are also used in herbal remedies and supplements to promote overall well-being.
